subcodes.first_line: O kind Lord! Praise be unto Thee, Who hast made the salamander faithful and intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خداوند مهربانا ستایش ترا که سمندر را وفاپرور نمودی و از پیمانه پیمان سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @prayer for spiritual recognition
